LB_EMPTY: *Not enough data for this period... Be the first!*
PROFILE_SUBTITLE: Your overall profile on the server.
ERR_NO_DATA: No data found for you yet. Try sending some messages first!
ERR_NO_DATA_PERIOD: Unfortunately, no data was recorded for you during this period.
ERR_STATS_CHANNEL: This command can only be used in the <#{id}> channel!
ERR_ADMIN_ONLY: This command is restricted to the admin channel: <#{id}>
REPORT_EMPTY_HISTORY: No entries found in the log yet.
GAME_ADDED: Added: If the name contains: `{name}`, the role will be: `Player: {suffix}`
GAME_REPORT_EMPTY: No data available for the selected period.
GAME_REPORT_DONE: The `{tf}` game report has been generated ({count} different games).
DB_RESET_SUCCESS: The database has been cleared! All activity data has been deleted.
CMD_TOP_DESC: Displays the weekly, monthly, or all-time leaderboard.
CMD_ADD_GAME_DESC: Add a new game for automatic role assignment.
CMD_ADD_GAME_NAME_DESC: Part of the game name (e.g., Minecraft)
CMD_REMOVE_GAME_DESC: Remove a game from the list.
CMD_GAME_REPORT_DESC: Generate a game popularity report in .txt format.
CMD_STATUS_REPORT_DESC: Generates a detailed TXT status report.
CMD_SYNC_MODE_DESC: Choice: guild (to this server), global (everywhere), copy (copy global here)
ERR_COOLDOWN: Please wait! You can use this command again in {retry_after:.1f} seconds.
CMD_CLEAR_DONE: All registered commands (global and server) have been deleted. You can now use the {cmd} command to refresh them.
INFO_DESC: Welcome. I am Iris, the silent observer of this network. 👁️ I do not interfere, but I record every piece of data: your messages, voice channel dynamics, and Spotify rhythms. I do not speak much, but I know exactly how much energy you contribute to the community. Your loyalty and activity are acknowledged through ranks and points. Be prepared, for in my realm, nothing goes unnoticed.
INFO_FEATURES_DESC:
• `/info` - The command you're seeing now: shows the bot description and the command list.
• `/weekly_chances` - Check your chances of winning the weekly champion ranks.
• `/top`, `/me` & `/server_analysis` - Leaderboards, personal profile cards, and detailed activity charts.
• **Weekly Champions** - Become the top gamer (GodGamer), the biggest music fan (SpotiViber), or the king of memes (MemeLord)!
• **Meme Factory** - Share the funniest images and videos for extra points.
• **Auto Player Roles** - Get automatic roles based on the games you are currently playing.
• **Inactivity Monitor** - If you haven't been active for a while, a {role} role will remind you that we miss you!
INFO_FOOTER: Use commands anywhere, or in the terminal channel!
INFO_DEV_FOOTER_NOTE: Most commands will automatically send Ephemeral (only you can see) messages to keep channels clean.
CMD_INFO_PUBLIC_DESC: Should the message be visible to everyone? (Admin only)
ERR_STATS_NOT_FOUND: The statistics channel is not found in the configuration! (stats_id)
CMD_SERVER_ANALYSIS_TYPE_DESC: What type of analysis do you want?
CMD_GAME_DETAILS_DESC: Detailed statistics for a specific game (Downloadable TXT).
CMD_STREAM_HISTORY_DESC: Export TXT report of all recorded stream sessions.
CMD_STREAM_HISTORY_DAYS_DESC: How many days back to search? (Default: 7)
STREAM_HISTORY_EMPTY: No recorded stream sessions found for this period.
STREAM_HISTORY_DONE: Stream history for the last {days} days generated ({count} entries).
CMD_MEMBERSHIP_LOGS_DESC: Export join and leave logs to a TXT file.
MEMBERSHIP_LOG_EMPTY: No membership events found in the database.
CHAMPIONS_FOOTER: Congratulations to the champions! Wear your roles with pride for 1 week!
CHAMPION_HALL_OF_FAME: **NEW HALL OF FAMER:** {name} reached their 5th victory, earning permanent membership!
REPORT_CHAMPIONS_EMPTY: No champions recorded on this server yet.
ERR_PUBLIC_CHANNELS: This command can be used in either the Admin (<#{admin_id}>) or Public (<#{stats_id}>) channel.
CMD_TEST_WEEKLY_LAYOUT_DESC: Preview the new weekly champion layout with dummy data.
CMD_LINK_ALT_DESC: Link a mini account to a main account.
CMD_LIST_CHANNELS_DESC: Export all server channels with their types to a TXT file.
CMD_LIST_ROLES_DESC: Export server roles and permissions to a TXT file.
CMD_WEEKLY_STANDINGS_DESC: Shows who is currently leading the weekly champion lists.
WEEKLY_STANDINGS_FOOTER: This is a live preview. The final distribution happens on Monday dawn!
WEEKLY_STANDINGS_KEEP_IT_UP: You're the boss for now, but don't get too comfortable! 😉
WEEKLY_STANDINGS_GO_FOR_IT: Only **{diff}** more to kick them off the throne... What are you waiting for?
CMD_ADD_EMOJI_DESC: Add an emoji or sticker from emoji.gg.
CMD_DELETE_EMOJI_DESC: Delete an emoji or sticker from the server.
CMD_DELETE_EMOJI_NAME_DESC: The name or ID of the emoji or sticker
CMD_LARGE_EMOJI_DESC: Show a large version of an emoji.
CMD_LIST_EMOJIS_DESC: List all custom emojis and stickers on this server.
ERR_EMOJI_NOT_FOUND: Emoji or sticker not found with name: `{name}`.
ERR_FETCH_EMOJI_GG: Error fetching data from emoji.gg. Please check the ID!
ERR_INVALID_URL: The provided URL is invalid or the image could not be downloaded.
ERR_LIMIT_REACHED: Maximum number of emojis/stickers reached for this server!
ERR_ADD_MISSING_ARGS: Please provide either an emoji.gg ID OR a direct URL!
ERR_INVALID_ID: Invalid Discord ID (must be numbers only)!
ERR_NO_PERMISSION: I don't have permission to manage emojis/stickers on this server.
CMD_CHAMPIONS_FORCE_DESC: Manual weekly champion calculation (Admin only / Can be used anywhere).
LOG_EXTENSIONS_LOADED: Extensions loaded. Use {prefix}sync{suffix} to propagate slash commands.
MODAL_ALT_SUCCESS:
**Linking successful!**
Account <@{alt_id}> has been linked to the main account <@{main_id}>.
ERR_WRONG_GUILD: This command can only be used on the configured server ({guild_id}).
SUCCESS_CHAMPIONS_FORCED: Success! Weekly ranks have been calculated and distributed.
